memory.summary: My original plan to work on the assignment and reading is now interrupted by a friend's invitation for lunch.
I made good progress on the assignment analysis, but my friend's message indicates a lunch plan is about to start immediately.
I have made significant progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour remaining, I must finish immediately to meet the deadline.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the assignment analysis, which remains unfinished at 78% progress despite my recent efforts.
I missed the reading deadline entirely, and despite working late on the assignment, I still have high stress and sleep debt.
After working 1.5 hours, the analysis section is nearly complete at 92%, yet I still face a tight deadline and significant sleep debt.
The analysis section is now at 93% progress after working another half hour, though I still carry significant stress and sleep debt.
The analysis section is now 95% complete after a final half-hour of work, yet my stress and sleep debt remain critically high.
The analysis section is now 96% complete after working until 23:00, yet my stress and sleep debt remain critically high.
The analysis section is now 98% complete after working until 23:30, but my energy is depleted and stress remains critically high.

The analysis section is now fully complete, but my energy is at zero and stress remains critically high.
